channel.title: Welcome to maldocs on Maldocs
channel.description: Recent content in Welcome to maldocs on Maldocs

item.title: Cronos
item.description: This is a good box. Not too hard, requires thinking, good training. Enumeration Starting with an nmap scan… Nmap Nmap full scan # Nmap 7.91 scan initiated Wed Jan 6 23:45:54 2021 as: nmap -vv --reason -Pn -A --osscan-guess --version-all -p- -oN /results/scans/nmap/full_tcp_nmap.txt -oX /results/scans/xml/full_tcp_nmap.xml 10.10.10.13 Nmap scan report for 10.10.10.13 Host is up, received user-set (0.14s latency). Scanned at 2021-01-06 23:45:54 UTC for 240s Not shown: 65532 filtered ports Reason: 65532 no-responses PORT STATE SERVICE REASON VERSION 22/tcp open ssh syn-ack ttl 62 OpenSSH 7.

item.title: Shocker
Legacy
Buff
Lame
Recommendations
item.description: These are some of my favorite books, podcasts, blogs, news sites, and more! This is not a complete list, and will be continually updated. Books Attacking Network Protocols - James Forshaw Real-World Bug Hunting - Peter Yaworski Hacking Exposed 7 - Stuart McClure / Joel Scambray / George Kurtz Practical Malware Analysis - Michael Sikorski / Andrew Honig Hacking: The Art of Exploitation - Jon Erickson The Hacker Playbook 3 - Peter Kim Hash Crack: Password Cracking Manual (v3) - Joshua Picolet Red Team Field Manual - Ben Clark Crypto 101 - Laurens Van Houtven BulletProof SSL and TLS - Ivan Ristić Windows Internals I - Pavel Yosifovich Windows Internals II - Pavel Yosifovich Black Hat Python - Justin Seitz Black Hat Go - Tom Steele / Chris Patten / Dan Kottmann Podcasts Risky Business - Patrick Gray / Adam Boileau Darknet Diaries - Jack Rhysider Training Hack The Box OverTheWire Vulnhub PortSwigger WebSecurity Academy DetectionLab JuiceShop Research Blogs MalwareUnicorn Azeria Labs ADSecurity Daniel Miessler Schneier On Security News Slashdot BleepingComputer US-CERT Hacker News Conference Talks Weaponizing Your Pets: The War Kitteh and the Denial of Service Dog - Gene Bransfield HAKC THE POLICE - Bill Swearingen Jackpotting Automated Teller Machines Redux - Barnaby Jack Pwned By The Owner: What Happens When You Steal A Hacker’s Computer - Zoz Steal Everything, Kill Everyone, Cause Total Financial Ruin!

item.title: About
item.description: Hi there I’m Ian (@m1thryn). Security enthusiast, tinkerer, wanna-be hacker. I run this blog as an outlet for research, a place to store ctf notes, and a way to continue learning. Interested in offensive security. Contact Me: Twitter Github Email GPG $ gpg --fingerprint --list-keys gpg@ianmckay.33mail.com pub rsa4096 2020-06-21 [SC] E08D 4AAE B48D 92CA EF88 C271 4124 4D04 2615 4CFC uid [ultimate] Ian Mckay <gpg@ianmckay.
